artPrompt: A jagged volcanic mountain gully whose contorted ridgelines twist into an absurd shape, glowing ember fissures snaking along borders that visibly shift and wander across the scorched land, dice scattered in the dust below. A single dramatic shaft of firelight rakes the warped peaks while smoke-black night pools in the ravines. No central figure. Rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: Gerrymandered Gully
text:
When Gerrymandered Gully enters the battlefield, redraw the district lines: roll a six-sided die. On odd, this land is a Mountain. On even, this land is still definitely a Mountain, you just moved the border a little.
{T}: Add {R}.
{1}, {T}: The loudest player at the table loses 1 life from sheer political frustration. You decide who is loudest.
flavorText: The map used to be a square. Now it is shaped like a goblin holding a sandwich.
